hero.name: My name is Mohssin.
hero.tagline: I'm a Computer Science & AI student from Sudan, currently studying at Asia Pacific University in Malaysia.
hero.sub: I build systems that think. From AI-integrated productivity tools to automated personal operating systems — I design the infrastructure that makes everything else work.

about.label: About Me
about.title: The Story Behind the Systems
about.p1: In 2023, a war started in Sudan. I lost almost everything — but I didn't lose my direction. That moment made one thing clear: I needed to build something that could move with me, no matter where I ended up.
about.p2: I ended up in Malaysia, studying Computer Science & AI at Asia Pacific University. And I started building.
about.p3: Every system I wanted to create, I found it was possible in Notion. So I started reverse-engineering templates — understanding how they were structured, why they worked, what made them break. Days became hours. Then, once I combined that knowledge with AI? Hours became minutes.
about.p4: That process led me to PALMS — my Personal Automated Life Management System. Twenty interconnected databases, five AI agents, and a direct communication channel between AI and Notion via MCP. It's not a project. It's running right now.
about.p5: I'm a CS & AI student who builds real systems. And I want to help others build theirs.
about.pillar1Desc: I don't just use tools — I design the structure that makes them work together.
about.pillar2Desc: Every system I build is designed for AI to operate within it, not just alongside it.
about.pillar3Desc: The real power isn't in any single tool. It's in how they connect.

whatIDo.label: What I Do
whatIDo.title: Building Systems That Think
whatIDo.subtitle: Not just tools. Not just templates. Infrastructure that connects, automates, and evolves.
whatIDo.service1Desc: Designing interconnected database structures that grow with your work — not against it. From personal wikis to full team operating systems.
whatIDo.service2Desc: Connecting AI models directly to your tools via MCP and APIs — so your systems don't just store information, they act on it.
whatIDo.service3Desc: Eliminating the manual work between your tools. Tasks that move themselves, updates that happen automatically, context that never gets lost.
whatIDo.service4Desc: Building the full-stack life management system — study, business, content, health, finance — running together as one integrated architecture.

projects.label: Projects
projects.title: What I've Built
projects.subtitle: More coming soon.
projects.palmsTitle: PALMS — Personal Automated Life Management System
projects.palmsDesc: A 20-database Notion architecture covering study, business, content, health, and finance — powered by 5 AI agents connected via MCP (Model Context Protocol). Agents read across all databases and return structured audits, priorities, and recommendations. Running live.

contact.label: Contact
contact.title: Let's Build Something
contact.subtitle: Whether you want to talk systems, collaboration, or just want to connect — I'm always open to a good conversation.
